rationale: Option B reuses an established 3-part config-promotion pattern (AutomationConfig + config-schema.json + resolve_variable/to_dict) that already repeats 3+ times, and run_claude_command already threads config-sourced timeout/idle_timeout from 7 call sites. Option A (psutil liveness polling) has zero precedent for children()/cpu_times() polling anywhere in scripts/, and fsm/host_guard.py deliberately avoids psutil for a similar resource-probing need.
rule: Option B: raise the flat 30s post-stream-close constant via config, not psutil liveness polling
alternatives_rejected: Option A: psutil-based liveness polling (poll process-group children/CPU-time to a longer cap) — wholly new infrastructure with no existing test scaffolding for a live grandchild process
